遂に決戦の時が来た……！！<br>今日こそ、科学に勝ってみせるわ！！:
The final battle is here at last...! Today, I'm gonna beat science for
sure!
さあ、おにーさん！ どんどん、持ってきて！<br>何が来ても、ベリサちゃんの炎魔:
Come on, Mister! Keep 'em coming! No matter what, Verisa's fire
magic will beat them!
ヒーター、コタツ、ホットカーペットに、電気毛布～～っ！？<br>これ、ぜーんぶ暖:
A heater, a kotatsu, a hot carpet, and an electric blanket! These are
all heating appliances!?
ぐぅぅ……種類多すぎでしょ～……<br>あたしの炎魔法でやれるのは、焚き火くらい:
Ugh... There are way too many kinds... And yet, with my fire magic, all
I can do is make a campfire...!
こうなったら、あたしの身体で直に温めてやるぅ～～！ ぎゅぅぅ～！<br>どう、お:
I'll warm you up with my body! *squeeze*! How 'bout that, Mister?
Which is warmer? Forget the 'magic doesn't count' thing!
